TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Atayal Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://tay.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay, title = {Atayal Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: == Bashar al-Assad == ryax sa tay 11 nqu tay 9, Bashar al-Assad, squliq na sezi'. (minhtuw sa kawas tay 1965) mrhuw Syria ta' misuw hya' ga Bashar al-Assad, aring ryax tay 17 squ byacing tay 7 sa kawas 2000 lga, musa' spazyang balay ms'rux kya la. qnxan nya(qyanux nya) Bashar al-Assad htagan beh sa Syria Damascus,maki ryax tay 11 squ byacing tay 9 sa kawas 1965. te sazing mlikuy laqi ru te cyugal laqi,Anisa Makhlouf ru Hafez al-Assad lalu nya. kawas tay 1927,yugun nya lalu nya. al-Assad pincbaq mqwas biru maki Arab,French ru al-Hurriya pqwasan biru. kawas tay 1982,tmasot gocyu pqwasan biru lga,mqaws biru beh Damascus hopa pqwasan biru. kawas tay 1988,tmosat pkita nbu hopa pqwasan biru,aring Tishrin Mhetay zyaw byoing maki Damascus praw sinsiy phgup. Bashar al-Assad sraral ga pcbaq maki Franco-Arab al-Hurriyah pqwasan biru.baq balay kmal ke na ego. kawas tay 2000 byacing tay 12 maki bes na Rsma al-Assad. maki sazing mlikuy laqi ru qutux kneril laqi. te qutux laqi Hafez al-Assad lalu nya,tnaq lalu yutas nya.kawas tay 2003 htagan na ryax,hiya ga kneril laqi Zein lalu nya.kawas tay 2004 htagan na ryax,hiya ga te sazing mlikuy laqi Karim lalu nya. cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru'
S.PHON: == βas~ɕħar al-as~ɕs~ɕa* == rjax s~ɕa taj ** nqu taj *, βas~ɕħar al-as~ɕs~ɕa*, s~ɕquliq na s~ɕeziʔ. (minħtuw s~ɕa kawas~ɕ taj ****) mrħuw s~ɕjria taʔ mis~ɕuw ħjaʔ ɣa βas~ɕħar al-as~ɕs~ɕa*, ariŋ rjax taj ** s~ɕqu βjaʦ~ʨiŋ taj * s~ɕa kawas~ɕ **** lɣa, mus~ɕaʔ s~ɕpazjaŋ βalaj ms~ɕʔrux kja la. qnxan nja(qjanux nja) βas~ɕħar al-as~ɕs~ɕa* ħtaɣan βeħ s~ɕa s~ɕjria *amas~ɕʦ~ʨus~ɕ,maki rjax taj ** s~ɕqu βjaʦ~ʨiŋ taj * s~ɕa kawas~ɕ ****. te s~ɕaziŋ mlikuj laqi ru te ʦ~ʨjuɣal laqi,anis~ɕa makħlou* ru ħa*ez al-as~ɕs~ɕa* lalu nja. kawas~ɕ taj ****,juɣun nja lalu nja. al-as~ɕs~ɕa* pinʦ~ʨβaq mqwas~ɕ βiru maki araβ,*renʦ~ʨħ ru al-ħurrija pqwas~ɕan βiru. kawas~ɕ taj ****,tmas~ɕot ɣoʦ~ʨju pqwas~ɕan βiru lɣa,mqaws~ɕ βiru βeħ *amas~ɕʦ~ʨus~ɕ ħopa pqwas~ɕan βiru. kawas~ɕ taj ****,tmos~ɕat pkita nβu ħopa pqwas~ɕan βiru,ariŋ tis~ɕħrin mħetaj zjaw βjoiŋ maki *amas~ɕʦ~ʨus~ɕ praw s~ɕins~ɕij pħɣup. βas~ɕħar al-as~ɕs~ɕa* s~ɕraral ɣa pʦ~ʨβaq maki *ranʦ~ʨo-araβ al-ħurrijaħ pqwas~ɕan βiru.βaq βalaj kmal ke na eɣo. kawas~ɕ taj **** βjaʦ~ʨiŋ taj ** maki βes~ɕ na rs~ɕma al-as~ɕs~ɕa*. maki s~ɕaziŋ mlikuj laqi ru qutux kneril laqi. te qutux laqi ħa*ez al-as~ɕs~ɕa* lalu nja,tnaq lalu jutas~ɕ nja.kawas~ɕ taj **** ħtaɣan na rjax,ħija ɣa kneril laqi zein lalu nja.kawas~ɕ taj **** ħtaɣan na rjax,ħija ɣa te s~ɕaziŋ mlikuj laqi karim lalu nja. ʦ~ʨinkħulan s~ɕa knitaʔ s~ɕa βrβiruʔ
S.FORM: == Bashar al-Assad == ryax sa tay 11 nqu tay 9, Bashar al-Assad, squliq na sezi'. (minhtuw sa kawas tay 1965) mrhuw Syria ta' misuw hya' ga Bashar al-Assad, aring ryax tay 17 squ byacing tay 7 sa kawas 2000 lga, musa' spazyang balay ms'rux kya la. qnxan nya(qyanux nya) Bashar al-Assad htagan beh sa Syria Damascus,maki ryax tay 11 squ byacing tay 9 sa kawas 1965. te sazing mlikuy laqi ru te cyugal laqi,Anisa Makhlouf ru Hafez al-Assad lalu nya. kawas tay 1927,yugun nya lalu nya. al-Assad pincbaq mqwas biru maki Arab,French ru al-Hurriya pqwasan biru. kawas tay 1982,tmasot gocyu pqwasan biru lga,mqaws biru beh Damascus hopa pqwasan biru. kawas tay 1988,tmosat pkita nbu hopa pqwasan biru,aring Tishrin Mhetay zyaw byoing maki Damascus praw sinsiy phgup. Bashar al-Assad sraral ga pcbaq maki Franco-Arab al-Hurriyah pqwasan biru.baq balay kmal ke na ego. kawas tay 2000 byacing tay 12 maki bes na Rsma al-Assad. maki sazing mlikuy laqi ru qutux kneril laqi. te qutux laqi Hafez al-Assad lalu nya,tnaq lalu yutas nya.kawas tay 2003 htagan na ryax,hiya ga kneril laqi Zein lalu nya.kawas tay 2004 htagan na ryax,hiya ga te sazing mlikuy laqi Karim lalu nya. cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru'
S.PHON: == βas~ɕħar al-as~ɕs~ɕa* == rjax s~ɕa taj ** nqu taj *, βas~ɕħar al-as~ɕs~ɕa*, s~ɕquliq na s~ɕeziʔ. (minħtuw s~ɕa kawas~ɕ taj ****) mrħuw s~ɕjria taʔ mis~ɕuw ħjaʔ ɣa βas~ɕħar al-as~ɕs~ɕa*, ariŋ rjax taj ** s~ɕqu βjaʦ~ʨiŋ taj * s~ɕa kawas~ɕ **** lɣa, mus~ɕaʔ s~ɕpazjaŋ βalaj ms~ɕʔrux kja la. qnxan nja(qjanux nja) βas~ɕħar al-as~ɕs~ɕa* ħtaɣan βeħ s~ɕa s~ɕjria *amas~ɕʦ~ʨus~ɕ,maki rjax taj ** s~ɕqu βjaʦ~ʨiŋ taj * s~ɕa kawas~ɕ ****. te s~ɕaziŋ mlikuj laqi ru te ʦ~ʨjuɣal laqi,anis~ɕa makħlou* ru ħa*ez al-as~ɕs~ɕa* lalu nja. kawas~ɕ taj ****,juɣun nja lalu nja. al-as~ɕs~ɕa* pinʦ~ʨβaq mqwas~ɕ βiru maki araβ,*renʦ~ʨħ ru al-ħurrija pqwas~ɕan βiru. kawas~ɕ taj ****,tmas~ɕot ɣoʦ~ʨju pqwas~ɕan βiru lɣa,mqaws~ɕ βiru βeħ *amas~ɕʦ~ʨus~ɕ ħopa pqwas~ɕan βiru. kawas~ɕ taj ****,tmos~ɕat pkita nβu ħopa pqwas~ɕan βiru,ariŋ tis~ɕħrin mħetaj zjaw βjoiŋ maki *amas~ɕʦ~ʨus~ɕ praw s~ɕins~ɕij pħɣup. βas~ɕħar al-as~ɕs~ɕa* s~ɕraral ɣa pʦ~ʨβaq maki *ranʦ~ʨo-araβ al-ħurrijaħ pqwas~ɕan βiru.βaq βalaj kmal ke na eɣo. kawas~ɕ taj **** βjaʦ~ʨiŋ taj ** maki βes~ɕ na rs~ɕma al-as~ɕs~ɕa*. maki s~ɕaziŋ mlikuj laqi ru qutux kneril laqi. te qutux laqi ħa*ez al-as~ɕs~ɕa* lalu nja,tnaq lalu jutas~ɕ nja.kawas~ɕ taj **** ħtaɣan na rjax,ħija ɣa kneril laqi zein lalu nja.kawas~ɕ taj **** ħtaɣan na rjax,ħija ɣa te s~ɕaziŋ mlikuj laqi karim lalu nja. ʦ~ʨinkħulan s~ɕa knitaʔ s~ɕa βrβiruʔ
